policy.name: Weekly B+ Add-on Reinvestment Simulation
policy.entry: Buy every B-or-better weekly signal at the next trading day open.
policy.base_buy: 1 share per weekly B+ signal, treated as new capital.
policy.reinvestment: Available realized proceeds are equally reinvested into the current week's B+ signals; fractional shares are allowed.
policy.trend_exit: Close < SMA50 triggers symbol-level exit at next open.
policy.score_exit: Weekly score < 700 triggers symbol-level exit at next open.
policy.time_exit: Default lot-level time exit: 60 trading days / about 12 weeks.
policy.benchmark: SPY equivalent uses the same buy dates, buy amounts, and exit dates as the simulated lots.

data_policy.signal_data_cutoff: Saturday snapshot based on prior market close data.
data_policy.entry_price: Next trading day open with buy slippage.
data_policy.exit_price: Stop price or next trading day open with sell slippage.
